title: PluginCapabilitiesDto
description: Describes the declarative capabilities of a plugin.

contentProviders.description: List of content providers provided by the plugin.

packManagers.description: List of pack managers provided by the plugin.

PackManagerHandlersDto.description: Names of plugin functions that implement specific pack manager logic.

description.description: Optional detailed description of what this capability does.

handlers.description: Set of functions provided by the plugin to handle content operations.

icon.description: Optional icon file name or URL for the UI.

id.description: Identifier for the capability (lowercase, kebab/underscore allowed).

supportsInstallAtomic.description: Whether the provider supports installing individual items.

supportsInstallModpacks.description: Whether the provider supports installing complex modpacks or curated collections.

description.description: Optional detailed description of what this capability does.

fieldLabel.description: Optional field label shown in the pack manager UI.

handlers.description: Set of functions provided by the plugin to handle pack operations.

icon.description: Optional icon file name or URL for the UI.

id.description: Identifier for the capability (lowercase, kebab/underscore allowed).

supportedExtensions.description: List of supported file extensions, e.g., [`zip`, `mrpack`].

supportsCheckUpdates.description: Whether this manager supports checking for updates.

supportsInstall.description: Whether this manager supports installing packs.

supportsUpdate.description: Whether this manager supports updating packs.

ProviderHandlersDto.description: Names of plugin functions that implement specific content provider logic.
